options.a: The speed at which onset of artificial stall warning occurs with the aeroplane NOT exceeding 1-g conditions.
options.b: The 1-g stall speed at which the aeroplane can develop lift equal to its weight.
options.c: The speed at which onset of natural stall warning occurs with the aeroplane NOT exceeding 1-g conditions.
options.d: The stall speed or the minimum steady flight speed at which the aeroplane is controllable in 1-g conditions.
